CITATION
===============================================
Anvi'o will use 'pyrodigal-gv' by Martin Larralde to identify open reading
frames in your data. It is an extension of 'pyrodigal'
(doi:10.21105/joss.04296), which builds upon the approach originally implemented
by Hyatt et al (doi:10.1186/1471-2105-11-119), with additional metagenomics
models for giant viruses and viruses with alternative genetic codes by Camargo
et al. (doi:10.1038/s41587-023-01953-y). If you publish your findings, please do
not forget to properly credit all three work.
